objectives.title: Application orchestration evidence is visible
objectives.pass_claim: Static conversation, runtime, event, and verification evidence is present in the application-server scope.
objectives.unknown_claim: The application-server scope does not prove the complete Agent execution flow.
objectives.recommendation: Keep cross-package Agent execution claims explicitly bound to versioned SDK and verification evidence.

zh-CN.title: 应用编排证据可识别
zh-CN.pass_claim: 应用服务器范围内存在可定位的会话编排、运行、事件与验证证据。
zh-CN.unknown_claim: 应用服务器范围不足以证明完整的 Agent 执行流程。
zh-CN.recommendation: 将跨包的 Agent 执行声明明确关联到具体 SDK 版本和验证证据。

objectives.title: Runtime isolation and recovery evidence is inspectable
objectives.pass_claim: Static runtime, isolation, and failure-handling evidence is present in the bounded scope.
objectives.unknown_claim: The bounded scope does not prove isolation and recovery for every execution path.
objectives.recommendation: Bind sandbox actions and recovery paths to explicit, inspectable result evidence.

zh-CN.title: 运行隔离与恢复证据可核查
zh-CN.pass_claim: 有界审查范围内存在可定位的运行、隔离与失败处理证据。
zh-CN.unknown_claim: 有界审查范围不足以证明所有执行路径均具备隔离与恢复机制。
zh-CN.recommendation: 将沙箱操作和恢复路径与明确、可核查的结果证据关联。

objectives.title: The external Agent core remains outside this checkout
objectives.pass_claim: Both the external dependency and a local Agent-core definition are evidenced.
objectives.unknown_claim: The checkout evidences an external Agent dependency but not a local Agent-core definition.
objectives.recommendation: Audit the separately versioned Agent SDK before making end-to-end execution claims.

zh-CN.title: 外部 Agent 核心不在当前检出版本中
zh-CN.pass_claim: 当前检出版本同时提供了外部依赖与本地 Agent 核心实现证据。
zh-CN.unknown_claim: 当前检出版本证明了外部 Agent 依赖，但未证明存在本地 Agent 核心实现。
zh-CN.recommendation: 在作出端到端执行声明前，应单独审查具有独立版本的 Agent SDK。
